champions.name: Alistar
champions.caution: Headbutt + Pulverize is your main engage — don't waste it.
champions.tips: Use Flash + Q for surprise engages. Use R for extra tankiness.

champions.name: Amumu
champions.caution: Your Q has a long CD early. Don't miss it.
champions.tips: Q for engage. W for damage. R for teamfight CC.

champions.name: Bard
champions.caution: Roaming leaves your ADC 1v2. Time your roams carefully.
champions.tips: Collect chimes for movespeed and mana. R can save teammates.

champions.name: Blitzcrank
champions.caution: Missed hook = 15s cooldown. Don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: W + Flash + E guarantees knockup. Position in bushes for surprise hooks.

champions.name: Brand
champions.caution: Very squishy. Needs to position safely.
champions.tips: Passive detonation does % HP damage. Combo: E > Q > W.

champions.name: Braum
champions.caution: Can't block all projectiles. Unbreakable has cooldown.
champions.tips: Stack passive with autos and Q. Use E to block key abilities.

champions.name: Galio
champions.caution: Your ult has a long CD. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: W for taunt. E for engage. R for global peel.

champions.name: Janna
champions.caution: Very squishy. One hook and you're dead.
champions.tips: Use Q to interrupt engages. Shield ADC before trades.

champions.name: Karma
champions.caution: Mantra Q is great poke but costs mana. Use wisely.
champions.tips: Mantra E gives big shield + move speed. Mantra W roots.

champions.name: Leona
champions.caution: E is your engage — if you miss, you're vulnerable.
champions.tips: E + Q + R is your full combo. Use W before engaging for tankiness.

champions.name: Lulu
champions.caution: Very squishy. Position behind ADC.
champions.tips: Use W on ADC for attack speed, on enemy for polymorph. R saves lives.

champions.name: Lux
champions.caution: Very squishy. Q is your only self-peel.
champions.tips: Q + E + R is your kill combo. Shield before trades.

champions.name: Morgana
champions.caution: Black shield has long cooldown. Use it wisely.
champions.tips: Q is a long root — use it to catch enemies. E shields allies.

champions.name: Nami
champions.caution: Bubble is your only CC — don't miss it.
champions.tips: E on ADC for extra damage + slow. W bounces for heal/poke.

champions.name: Nasus
champions.caution: Weak early. Need to scale.
champions.tips: W for slow. E for armor shred. Farm Q for scaling.

champions.name: Nautilus
champions.caution: Hook is your engage — don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: Hook + passive root + E slow is your combo. Ult locks down carries.

champions.name: Pantheon
champions.caution: Fall off late game. Use early pressure.
champions.tips: E for block. W for stun. R for roam.

champions.name: Pyke
champions.caution: Very squishy. Must land hooks or be useless.
champions.tips: W gives invisibility and move speed. R executes and resets.

champions.name: Rakan
champions.caution: E is your escape — save it to get out after engaging.
champions.tips: W knockup + Q + E back is your poke combo. Ultimate charms enemies.

champions.name: Rell
champions.caution: Your W is slow. Predict enemy movement.
champions.tips: W for engage, E for stun, R for teamfight CC.

champions.name: Senna
champions.caution: Very squishy. Bad positioning gets you killed instantly.
champions.tips: Collect souls from poke. Build lethality for damage, enchanter for utility.

champions.name: Seraphine
champions.caution: Very squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Double cast E for root, double cast W for heal. Ultimate is game-changing.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage comp you can kite

champions.name: Sona
champions.caution: Very squishy. One hook and you're dead.
champions.tips: Stack Q for poke, W for sustain, E for speed. Ult is game-changing.

champions.name: Soraka
champions.caution: Very squishy. Heal uses HP — position safely.
champions.tips: Use Q to regain HP. Save R for cross-map saves.

champions.name: Taric
champions.caution: Your ultimate has a delay. Predict engages.
champions.tips: Q for heal. W for shield. E for stun. R for invulnerability.

champions.name: Thresh
champions.caution: Hook is your engage — don't hook tanks into your team.
champions.tips: Use Q to hook, E to flay, R to slow. W saves teammates.

champions.name: Veigar
champions.caution: Weak early game. Needs to stack AP safely.
champions.tips: Use cage to zone and trap. Stack passive on minions and champions.

champions.name: Vel'Koz
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for waveclear. E for CC. R for true damage burst.

champions.name: Xerath
champions.caution: Squishy and immobile. Position is crucial.
champions.tips: Q for poke. W for slow. E for stun. R for burst.

champions.name: Yuumi
champions.caution: You are your ADC's item. If they die, you die.
champions.tips: Attach to your ADC. Heal with E, poke with Q, ult to win.

champions.name: Zilean
champions.caution: Squishy. Position carefully.
champions.tips: Q for stun. W for CD reset. E for speed. R for revive.

champions.name: Zyra
champions.caution: Rooted while using abilities. Position safely.
champions.tips: Place plants in hook paths to block skillshots. E + W + Q is your poke combo.
pickWhen: Enemy has engage supports (plants counter hooks)
